description_long: This is a military jet aircraft with a streamlined fuselage and swept-back wings, finished in a camouflage paint scheme of green, brown, and tan with red star insignias on the wings and tail. The aircraft features a pointed nose cone, a bubble canopy cockpit positioned near the front, and twin jet exhausts at the rear. The wings are mid-mounted and sharply swept, with small pylons or hardpoints visible beneath them. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, both swept back. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it is likely retractable. The overall design is characteristic of Cold War-era Soviet fighter jets.
description: A camouflaged military jet with swept-back wings, red star insignias, and a pointed nose cone, featuring a bubble canopy cockpit and twin rear jet exhausts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the jet, swept-back wings, and prominent red star insignias on the tail and wings.
description_view_1: Front oblique view highlighting the pointed nose cone, bubble canopy cockpit, and the angular sweep of the wings.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view displaying the twin jet exhausts, single vertical stabilizer, and the camouflage pattern across the wings and fuselage.
description_view_3: Top-rear view emphasizing the planform of the swept wings, tail configuration, and the distribution of camouflage colors.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept wings with no visible winglets and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two swept horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed bubble canopy cockpit, likely single-seat.
